scenario: Forem work session - audit the Article contract before a teardown rework

steps.name: Map the Article contract and what it is built on
Trace how an article and its attached data are handled on change
Audit every dependent of the Article contract
Trace how article identity and visibility are guarded
Assess the blast radius of the contract change

misses.detail: pre-MCP bypasses: 0, post-MCP verification reads: 0, post-MCP misses: 0 (diagnostic only — grep_count drives fluency)
